title: rubus granulatus
intro: Rubus granulatus, also known as the clustered raspberry or thimble berry, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus granulatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Rubus granulatus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
